About Me

Graphic Designer Developer Brand Creator

Graphic design meets
clean & powerful code.

I'm Nickson Rubia, a graphic designer and developer based in Nairobi with over 3 years turning ideas into bold visual identities and functional digital products. I work across both disciplines fluently. crafting logos, brand systems, and print-ready artwork on one side, and building fast, polished websites and interfaces on the other.

Most creatives do one or the other. I do both, which means your brand looks intentional, consistent, and alive whether on a business card, a billboard, or a browser.

My Approach

"I believe a great brand lives everywhere. From a perfectly kerned logo to a pixel-perfect interface, my job is to make sure it does."

01 Visual craft first, typography, colour, composition, every pixel is intentional →
02 Brand to browser, I take a brand from logo to live website, no handoff needed →
03 Print & digital fluency : brand systems that work on paper and on screen equally well →
04 Clean, scalable code : designs that are built to last, not just to impress →

Exprell Times — TikTok Channel

Managing and growing the official Exprell Times TikTok channel (@exprell_times). A fast-growing news platform with 7,346 followers, 90.4K likes and a single video that hit 1.3M views. Covers breaking local and international news in short-form video, mirroring the website and keeping audiences informed and engaged.

What I Do

Services

From first sketch to final pixel, every service is built around one goal: making your brand impossible to ignore.

01

Graphic Design & Branding

Full visual identities built from the ground up. Logos, colour systems, typography, and brand guidelines that give your business a distinctive, lasting voice.

Logo DesignBrand GuidelinesColour SystemsTypography
02

Web Design & Development

End-to-end digital products from user research and wireframes to a pixel-perfect, fully developed website or web app that is fast, responsive, and built to convert.

UI / UX DesignReact / Next.jsWebflowResponsive
03

Print Design

Print-ready artwork for every touchpoint. Business cards, brochures, banners, packaging, and publications that carry your brand into the world.

Business CardsBrochuresBannersPosters
04

Motion & Video

Animated graphics, logo reveals, social reels, and motion identities that bring your brand to life, crafted for social media, presentations, and broadcast.

Logo AnimationSocial ReelsAfter EffectsCapCut
05

Digital Marketing & SEO

Get found, get clicked, get results. From on-page SEO and keyword strategy to social media campaigns and content marketing to grow your digital footprint.

SEO StrategySocial CampaignsContent MarketingAnalytics
06

Web Management

Keep your website fast, secure, and always up to date. I handle ongoing maintenance, content updates, performance monitoring, and technical support.

MaintenanceContent UpdatesPerformanceWordPress

Not sure which service you need? Let us talk it through. I will point you in the right direction.
